header.name: Sean Luka Girgis
header.address: Murphy, TX (Plano area) / 424 Oriole Dr., Murphy, TX 75094

intro: I am applying for the AI Engineer Senior Consultant position at Deloitte. I am drawn to Deloitte’s mission to make an impact that matters, particularly through innovative AI and digital transformation solutions that solve real-world problems.
body: With over 20 years of experience in data engineering and a strong focus on AI solutions, I am equipped to design and deliver secure, scalable LLM/GenAI solutions as outlined in the role’s responsibilities. My recent project, an AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline (2026), involved building a 10-step agentic workflow using Python, Claude Code, and Grok (xAI) APIs, integrating RAG patterns and vector search with FAISS embeddings for semantic similarity matching across 100+ job postings. This directly aligns with Deloitte’s need for expertise in LLM models like Claude and Gemini, as well as implementing RAG and retrieval systems with governance controls.

My tenure as a Senior Capacity & Data Engineer at CITI (2017-2025) honed my skills in data and AI engineering, specifically in building robust data pipelines for enterprise environments. I architected automated ETL/ELT pipelines using Python and Pandas, ingesting P95 telemetry from over 6,000 endpoints, which improved delivery reliability and supported real-time inference capabilities. This experience maps to your requirement for delivering governed datasets and feature engineering for ML training, ensuring performance and reliability in high-stakes settings.

Additionally, my work on a Serverless Lakehouse Platform using AWS (recent) demonstrates my proficiency in cloud platforms and DevOps practices. I designed a full serverless data platform with S3, Glue, Athena, and Bedrock, incorporating GenAI agents like Claude 3 Sonnet for Text-to-SQL capabilities, addressing cost-performance discipline akin to Deloitte’s focus on MLOps/LLMOps operations. I am committed to aligning with Deloitte’s core value of integrity by ensuring security controls and compliance in all technical designs.
conclusion: I am confident that my extensive background in AI engineering, data pipelines, and cloud solutions positions me to contribute effectively to Deloitte’s Human Capital team. I look forward to leveraging my skills to build impactful LLM-enabled capabilities and drive innovation in line with your commitment to outstanding value to clients.
